title: L@tuwshim #3912
definition:
Letushim = "hammered"

 1) the 2nd son of Dedan, grandson of Jokshan, great grandson of
    Abraham by Keturah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Letushim = "hammered"

 1) the 2nd son of Dedan, grandson of Jokshan, great grandson of
    Abraham by Keturah

    NASB:  hammered ones, desc. of Abraham and Keturah
